app.name: A11yFred
search.label: Describe the finding or observation
search.placeholder: e.g. modal close button no label
search.hint_submit: Type a description and press Search or Enter.
search.hint_voting: Vote results up or down to change their ranking — starred results always appear first.
search.hint_change_in: These options can be changed in
results.no_results_announce: No results for "{query}". Try a component name, element type, or a different phrase.
results.no_results_body: Try a component name, element type, or a different phrase.
detail.location_placeholder: e.g. Global: / Cart: / Product details pages:
detail.refine_hint_ai: Describe what to change and AI will rewrite and incorporate your updates or details. Change your AI model or turn this off in
detail.refine_hint_no_ai: Edit the fields above directly, or note changes here. Enable AI in
detail.refine_hint_no_ai_suffix: and it will rewrite based on your notes.
detail.refine_placeholder_ai: e.g. this is specific to mobile, element is a tooltip
detail.rewrite_aria: Save note and revise selected fields with AI
detail.nothing_to_copy_body: This field is empty. There is nothing to copy.
detail.confirm_reset_body: You've made significant changes to this text. Resetting will remove all of your edits.
settings.heading: Settings
settings.ai_enable_desc: Rewrites text based on your refinement notes.
settings.privacy_body_1: API keys are stored locally in your browser (localStorage) and sent only to the AI provider's own API — never to any intermediate server. You can clear them at any time by removing the key and saving, or by clearing your browser's site data.
settings.privacy_body_2: This app stores six things in localStorage: your theme preference, your language preference, your platform filter (Web/Native), your live search setting, your active AI provider, and your API key(s). No other data is stored or transmitted.
settings.privacy_body_translations: UI translations and base public corpus translations were generated with AI and may contain errors. No custom or user-entered data is ever sent out for translation.
settings.reduced_motion_note: You have reduced motion turned on, and we are actively acknowledging that system setting. Animations like confetti will be skipped until you change it in your OS accessibility settings.
notfound.heading: 404 — Lost at Sea
notfound.body: This page doesn't exist. Let's head back to shore.
footer.credit: Built by your digital neighbor, Mikey Ilagan
party.announce_full: Party mode activated! The font has changed to Comic Sans. The colours have changed to a random bright colour palette. Colourful confetti is now falling from the top of the screen in an assortment of colours and shapes. The mouse cursor is now a magic wand.
party.announce_reduced: Party mode activated! The font has changed to Comic Sans. The colours have changed to a random bright colour palette. The mouse cursor is now a magic wand. Confetti was skipped because reduced motion is turned on.
kofi.title: Ko-fi donation widget
about.what_body: This is your manual accessibility audit writing assistant. If you've done a few, you've done them all. Mostly. If you've been doing this a while you know how often we run into the same accessibility issues over and over again. I wanted to save myself the time of having to dig into old files and reports to find near-identical issues from past accessibility audits.
about.what_body_2: Consistency is key, especially in this industry and I wanted to make sure I was consistent with impact, severity, descriptions, and the oft-times similar suggested technical suggested fix steps. Search this homebrew library of WCAG-aligned finding write-ups, pick one that matches your observation, customize or add specifics to it, and copy/paste it straight into your audit report.
about.what_wcag: This data extends up to {wcag} (Level A and AA).
about.step_1_body: Type what you observed — a component name, element type, or plain-language description.
about.step_2_body: Use the Priority Up/Priority Down arrows on each result to tune how results are ranked. Star to show first. Archive to hide it.
about.step_3_body: Select the finding that best matches. Results are ranked by relevance.
about.step_4_body: Add a location prefix (e.g. "Global:") or use AI to help revise the wording.
about.feature_ai_body: Refine any finding description with a short note. Your API key, your AI provider — never stored server-side.
about.feature_languages_body: The UI is available in over 50 languages including RTL support. Switch in Settings.
about.feature_party_body: It's in Settings. Under Theme. You'll know it when you see it.
about.feature_a11y_body: Built to WCAG 2.2: focus management, live regions, keyboard navigation, reduced motion support, and high-contrast tokens.
about.coming_auth: Optional sign-in with Google or GitHub to sync your settings across devices.
about.coming_custom: Add and edit your own custom findings, stored privately in the cloud.
about.coming_ai: Additional AI providers: OpenAI, Google Gemini, and more.
settings.confirm_reset_all_body: This will clear all saved settings — including your API keys — and return everything to defaults. This cannot be undone.
settings.unsaved_body: You have unsaved changes to your AI settings. What would you like to do?
settings.language_changed_announce: Language: Changed, press Save button to confirm
results.vote_hint: Vote results up or down — higher-rated matches appear first. Star a result to always pin it to the top.
announce.starred: {title} starred — will appear first in relevant results.
settings.voting_on: Vote controls are visible on each result.
about.step_5_body: Copy the description and suggested fix steps directly into your spreadsheet or report.
search.view_all_confirm_body: This will show {count} results on this single page.
detail.revise_desc_checkbox: Include Finding Details / Description in revision
detail.revise_error_body: Something went wrong while revising. Press Save & Revise Selected to try again.
settings.api_key_error: Error: API key is required when AI Assist is enabled.
error.heading: Something Went Wrong
error.body: The finding library could not be loaded. Check your connection and
detail.revise_error_invalid_key: Invalid or expired API key ({provider}). Double-check your key in Settings.
detail.revise_error_rate_limit: Rate limit reached ({provider}). Wait a moment and try again.
detail.revise_error_service_error: {provider} service error ({status}). Try again in a few seconds.
detail.revise_error_network_error: No internet connection. Check your connection and try again.
error.announce: Something went wrong — the finding library could not be loaded. Check your connection and try again.
about.sources_body: Entries are written in plain language, near-duplicates are consolidated, and each is aligned to a specific WCAG success criterion. Sources consulted include:
detail.copy_all_aria: Copy description and suggested fix together
detail.copy_all_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps copied
detail.reset_all_fields_aria: Reset description and suggested fix to original values
detail.reset_all_fields_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps reset
detail.edit_lang_warning: Edits are session-only — switching language or finding will reset them.
edit.target_dialog_body: You're editing a finding while viewing it in {locale}.
edit.save_as_personal_desc: Stored locally on this device and private to you. Other languages will be AI-translated unless you edit them manually — translations only run during site maintenance.
edit.contribute_desc: Your edit will be queued for the maintainer to review before it becomes part of the shared corpus.
edit.scope_all_langs_desc: Other languages will be re-translated from the updated English on the next translation pass.
edit.personal_ai_warning: Only {locale} will be saved. Other languages will show AI-translated text. Translations are updated only during site maintenance.
edit.en_switch_dialog_body: Your {locale} version is saved. Here's the English version of the same finding. Make any edits and save, or skip to leave the English version unchanged.
settings.wcag_filter_desc: Show or hide entries introduced in each WCAG version.
results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
